intent: Extend fluid sizing governance to confirm and folder dialogs, then convert fixed visible dimensions there to responsive sizing.
assumptions: PR4 covers common dialog components, file dialogs, FileListDialogs, and confirm-dialog.css.
Hairline borders and grid lines remain built-in exceptions.
CreateFolderDialog.css is included even though it is not currently imported.
risks: Dialog glass visual effects depend on layered shadows, grids, and backdrop blur.
This phase must not change dialog behavior, props, service calls, or destructive action semantics.
Browser verification opens dialogs only and does not confirm destructive actions.
steps: Implement dialogs scope in the sizing checker.
Convert confirm and folder dialog fixed visible dimensions to rem/clamp semantic variables.
Convert batch move fixed small text size to rem.
Run dialogs sizing check, tests, lint, build, and browser visual verification.
